text.title: Proposal From Discovery Template — Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the proposal artefact. Validator enforces required header keys, three offer options, evidence anchors, and the closing action block.

example.note: version not semver; owner is a team not a person; last_reviewed not ISO date; only one option (not three); option missing scope/price/duration; no discovery_inputs; no actions.

text.reference: Validator script — see Scripts table in AGENTS.md.
